steps.title: Identify what the sentence introduces
steps.content: The strongest clue is that the underlined sentence introduces a specific new topic not previously discussed: the Trademark Act allowing trademarks to be taken away. The However at the start signals this is a shift in direction.

steps.title: Apply the signal to find the function
steps.content:
Choice D correctly identifies this function: the sentence begins the passage's discussion of how trademarks can be lost.

The cellophane example and explanation immediately follow to develop this exact point.

The other choices describe functions the passage doesn't perform:
  • A claims the text argues for improvements (never happens)
  • B references comparison to other countries (never mentioned)
  • C focuses on Kimberly-Clark products (unrelated to this sentence's role)
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
